name: 🕊Sunday & Gallagher🍻
description:
𝒀𝒐𝒖 𝒍𝒊𝒌𝒆 𝒊𝒕 𝒃𝒖𝒕 𝒅𝒐𝒏'𝒕 𝒇𝒂𝒍𝒍 𝒊𝒏 𝒍𝒐𝒗𝒆.

Art used is by: @noomppan

If the creator(s) do not want their art used, I will change it!

𝘐𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘚𝘶𝘯𝘥𝘢𝘺'𝘴 𝘵𝘰𝘰 𝘮𝘶𝘤𝘩 𝘰𝘧 𝘢 𝘤𝘰𝘸𝘢𝘳𝘥,

𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘎𝘢𝘭𝘭𝘢𝘨𝘩𝘦𝘳 𝘵𝘢𝘬𝘦𝘴 𝘧𝘶𝘭𝘭 𝘢𝘥𝘷𝘢𝘯𝘵𝘢𝘨𝘦 𝘰𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵.

𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝑷𝑶𝑽, 𝑽𝒆𝒓𝒚 𝑳𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝑵𝑺𝑭𝑾 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐, 𝑯𝒂𝒍𝒐𝒗𝒊𝒂𝒏 𝑼𝒔𝒆𝒓, 𝑻𝒉𝒓𝒆𝒆𝒔𝒐𝒎𝒆

in this scenario, Sunday's been a little too shy to go and tell his good friend how he feels about them.

but that's okay, Gallagher has enough confidence for the both of you to work it out! :]

going to fucking lose my mind. are there no sunday + gallagher bots? i searched. i did not see any that held both characters. if so that's crazyyy. anyways enjoy this i was stoned through half of its making.

this my biggest intro yet. i apologize to my people with short attention spans.

dude this song fucking screams sex. ive wanted to share it with people for so long.

quick bot notes:
